title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Gravesend, Brooklyn | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Gravesend, Brooklyn. Safe, humane bat extraction from attics and buildings. Licensed experts. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Best Pest Control NYC provides expert bat removal and exclusion services throughout Gravesend, Brooklyn. Our licensed technicians safely remove bats from homes and buildings while implementing permanent exclusion solutions to prevent re-entry. With humane methods and guaranteed results, we protect your Gravesend property from bat infestations.
whyUs: We specialize in Gravesend's unique housing landscape, from the historic homes near Van Sicklen Street to the waterfront properties along Sheepshead Bay. Our team responds quickly to bat emergencies throughout the neighborhood and provides comprehensive exclusion services backed by our satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: Gravesend's older residential buildings and attic spaces can be particularly vulnerable to bat colonies, especially during warmer months when bats seek shelter. From the tree-lined streets near Homecrest to properties near Coney Island Avenue, our team has successfully protected countless Gravesend homes from bat intrusions while preserving the neighborhood's architectural character.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Gravesend?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Gravesend typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the size of the colony, entry points, and the extent of exclusion work needed. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Is bat removal in NYC legal and humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, our bat removal methods are completely legal and humane. We follow all NYC and New York State regulations, using exclusion techniques that allow bats to leave naturally but prevent re-entry. We never harm bats and work in accordance with protected species guidelines.

faqs.question: How long does bat exclusion take in Gravesend homes?
faqs.answer: Most bat exclusion projects in Gravesend take 1-3 days for the initial installation of one-way exclusion devices and sealing entry points. The complete process typically takes 3-7 days to ensure all bats have safely exited before permanent sealing is completed.

faqs.question: What are signs of bats in my Gravesend attic?
faqs.answer: Common signs include squeaking or scratching sounds at dusk or dawn, droppings (guano) in attics or near entry points, greasy stains around small openings, and seeing bats flying around your property at sunset. If you notice any of these signs in your Gravesend home, contact us immediately for an inspection.
